gt_sql: SELECT T4.alignment, T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.power_id INNER JOIN alignment AS T4 ON T1.alignment_id = T4.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Atom IV'
pred_sql:
SELECT a.alignment, sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE s.superhero_name = 'Atom IV';
question: Give the alignment and superpowers of the superhero named Atom IV.
